ai_profile:
**Footprints Festival 2026: A Global Tapestry of Sound**  
Mark your calendars for February 21, 2026, as the Footprints Festival returns with a dynamic lineup of 19 artists from across the globe. This year’s event celebrates a kaleidoscope of genres, from pulsating Electronic beats and Psychedelic grooves to the rich traditions of Anatolian Rock, Malian Desert Blues, and Armenian Folk. With a lineup spanning over 30 unique musical styles, the festival promises an unparalleled auditory journey that bridges cultures and genres.

The festival’s diversity shines through its international representation, with artists hailing from 12 countries, including Germany, Nigeria, Turkey, Iran, and Japan. In addition to its geographical breadth, Footprints Festival champions inclusion, featuring 10 artists of color and a mix of solo acts and collaborative groups. While male artists dominate the lineup, there’s a growing presence of female and mixed-gender acts, reflecting a gradual shift toward broader representation in the music industry.

Known for its forward-thinking curation, Footprints Festival 2026 brings together both emerging and established talents, with 79% of the artists offering Spotify links to explore their work. Whether you're drawn to the hypnotic rhythms of Drum & Bass and UK Garage or the soulful melodies of Gospel and R&B, this year’s edition promises to leave an indelible mark on music lovers of all tastes. Don’t miss this celebration of sound, culture, and creativity!
